ol.li: Eviction Candidates: The Replacement Policy (LRU-K/Clock) MUST ONLY scan frames in the UNPINNED state. Any frame with RefCount > 0 is hard-locked.
WAL Protocol (Write-Ahead Logging): A page in DIRTY state cannot transition to EVICTING or UNPINNED (via flush) until the corresponding Log Records up to PageLSN are confirmed on persistent storage.

Concurrency Control:
UNPINNED -> PINNED: Atomic Increment on RefCount.
PINNED -> DIRTY: Requires Exclusive Latch on the Page.
DIRTY -> UNPINNED: Requires Shared Latch on Page and IO Lock.
Memory Layout: Total Pool Size = (sizeof(Frame) * Count) + PageTableOverhead. Alignment is 8-byte for LSN/Pointers.

g.title: Invariant: RefCount == 0. Frame resides in LRU-K candidate list.
Invariant: RefCount > 0. Exclusive or Shared latch held.
Invariant: Memory state != Disk state. PageLSN > FlushedLSN.
Invariant: Synchronous I/O in progress. Frame locked for replacement.
Invariant: RefCount == 0. Frame resides in LRU-K candidate list.
Invariant: RefCount > 0. Exclusive or Shared latch held.
Invariant: Memory state != Disk state. PageLSN > FlushedLSN.
Invariant: Synchronous I/O in progress. Frame locked for replacement.
